decision_point: In an adult with painful iliotibial band syndrome, is structured physical therapy or surgical release of the IT band preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with painful iliotibial band syndrome, is structured physical therapy or surgical release of the IT band preferred?
Options:
  1. Structured physical therapy
  2. Surgical IT band release
label: settled
label_rationale: Structured physical therapy, focusing on hip abductor strengthening and local biomechanical corrections, is highly effective; surgical release is not indicated initially.
